name: volume-candlestick
description: Candlestick chart with volume bars displayed in separate panel below for trading analysis

xAxisData.name: xAxisData
xAxisData.description: Array of date/time labels for the X-axis. Example: ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar']

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Example: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Example: 350

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override for customizing chart appearance. Example: {series: [{color: '#3b82f6'}]}

priceData.name: priceData
priceData.description: Array of OHLC price data. Each item is [open, close, low, high]. Example: [[100, 110, 95, 120], [110, 105, 100, 115]]

volumeData.name: volumeData
volumeData.description: Array of volume data corresponding to each price period. Example: [1000, 2000, 1500, 3000]
